answer:
Harvest provides API access for all accounts, including the free plan [1]. While some third-party sources suggest limitations, the official Harvest help documentation states that your subscription includes API access to manage your account regardless of your plan [1].

You can interact with your account programmatically using the REST API v2 at https://api.harvestapp.com/v2 [2][3]. Authentication requires either OAuth2 or a Personal Access Token [2][3]. Every request must include two headers: your token in the Authorization header and your account ID in the Harvest-Account-ID header [3].

```http
GET /v2/projects HTTP/1.1
Host: api.harvestapp.com
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN
Harvest-Account-ID: YOUR_ACCOUNT_ID
```

The API is subject to rate limits, generally 100 requests per 15 seconds [2]. Exceeding these limits will return an HTTP 429 status code [2].
